channel.title: Mousa Cloud Consulting on Mousa Cloud Consulting Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mousa Cloud Consulting on Mousa Cloud Consulting Blog

item.title: S3 Misconfiguration Still Top Risk in 2026: Case Study and Fixes for SaaS Providers
item.description: A hypothetical AWS case study on S3 public exposure, EU data residency gaps, and a phased remediation approach using presigned URLs, regional buckets, replication, versioning, and object lock.

item.title: How Tokenization Reduces Merchants' PCI Scope
item.description: A practical explanation of how tokenization reduces merchants’ PCI scope by limiting cardholder data exposure and shifting sensitive payment handling away from merchant systems.
